services_supported: Building AI agents for trades businesses
Enhancing workflows and efficiency for contractors
Critiquing and providing feedback on customer interactions
Plumbing and gas line connections for hot tub installations
Filtering of tasks based on estimated time required
Managing a high volume of calls and projects
Balancing the need to take on new work with the need to turn down projects that are outside their expertise
Ensuring that the team has the necessary skills and training to complete projects efficiently and effectively
Managing a high volume of service calls and projects
Balancing the need to take on new work with the need to turn down projects that are outside their expertise
Ensuring that the team has the necessary skills and training to complete projects efficiently and effectively
Routing calls to electricians based on their skillsets, schedules, and availability
Routing calls to a virtual assistant, who can verify the caller before transferring the call to the contractor
Receiving notifications when a call is received
Setting up personal numbers to be screened
non_emergency_routing_rules: Calls will be forwarded to Clara by default from the contractor's main business line, and if the contractor does not answer or decline a call, it will be forwarded to Clara
call_transfer_rules: Clara can transfer calls to the contractor's second number if someone needs to speak with them directly, and if the contractor is unavailable, Clara will forward the call to the second number
notes: The company is a contractor's business that aims to be the best in the industry, with a focus on customer satisfaction and efficient workflow management. The system will be configured to answer calls, and the agent will be trained on the system and will have access to the dashboard. The system will be tested and calibrated before going live, and the agent will be able to forward calls to the main line and patch through to the agent if requested. The contractor aims to minimize spam calls and edge cases, and will start with keeping the door
